category_sources: source_facts.description says OpenSSL based Authenticode signing; official GitHub README says osslsigncode implements Authenticode signing and timestamping.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osslsigncode; official GitHub README title is osslsigncode.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mtrojnar/osslsigncode, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OpenSSL Authenticode signing for PE/MSI/Java CAB files; official README lists signing, timestamping, verification, removal, and extraction for PE, CAB, CAT, MSI, APPX, and scripts.
